pi_items.source: Verified through task.json description ('before January 1, 2015'), setup_task.sh SQL queries (Date < '2015-01-01'), and verifier.py legacy detection logic (Date < '2015-01-01'). Consistent across all three task files.

Verified through: (1) seed_demodb.py line 76 defines 'CREATE CLASS Reviews EXTENDS V'; (2) task description states 'Archive these legacy reviews from the Reviews graph vertex class'; (3) verifier.py lines 122 and 132 query 'SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM Reviews WHERE Date...'

Verified through: (1) task.json description step 1 states 'Create a new class named ArchivedReviews'; (2) setup_task.sh line 19 includes 'DROP CLASS ArchivedReviews UNSAFE' to clean previous runs; (3) verifier.py lines 79 and 87 check for ArchivedReviews class existence and count records

privileged_info_summary: The archive_legacy_reviews task operates on a travel agency graph database (DemoDB) with a Reviews vertex class. The cutoff date for legacy reviews is 2015-01-01 (strictly before this date). Legacy reviews are migrated from the Reviews class to a newly created ArchivedReviews class. The data is synthetic: seed_demodb.py creates the baseline database with hotels and profiles but no reviews; setup_task.sh then inserts exactly 2 test legacy reviews (dated 2014-05-20 and 2010-01-01) connected to a random hotel and profile for verification.
